'''Ana Blue''' (also known as '''Sinewy Ana Blue''') was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who ran the [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] games at [[Skip 1]] in the [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]]. She was known as '''Blue''' because of a [[Color/Legends|blue]] jewel she had embedded in a [[Tooth/Legends|tooth]].

==Biography==
The [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Ana Blue was a smuggler from whom [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] won a large amount of money on several occasions.<ref name="TNR" /> She first met Han when he was learning the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] trade. She rebuffed his advances, saying he wasn't seasoned enough for her.<ref name="THG" />

Ana participated in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] by piloting [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac the Hutt's]] personal yacht, the ''[[Dragon Pearl]]'', which was also the flagship of the smuggler fleet.<ref name="THG">''[[The Hutt Gambit]]''</ref>

In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], Ana got involved in an operation smuggling former Imperial goods to [[Kueller]] in his campaign against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. When a man she loved, [[Davis]], was killed by one of Kueller's bombs, she revealed all she knew about the operation to Solo, including the fact that Kueller was trying to lure him in order to, in turn, lure in Leia and Luke in order to kill them. However, Kueller later revealed to his assistant that Blue had done her job well, and ordered a doubling of her pay in accordance with their promise.<ref name="TNR" />
